name: 3D Isometric NPC Agent — Random Wander + State Machine
description: AI agent in 3D isometric world with random movement, state machine (idle/walking/working), spawn points, and wander radius. Supports behavior trees and optional connection to external workflow.

input.name: definition
input.description: Agent config: id, name, role, color, startX, startY, wanderRadius

output.name: agent
output.description: Agent instance with position, state, movement

author: Tiranyx
